Tooth Whitening Teeth tend to discolor with age or become yellowish as part of normal ageing  process or due to habbits such as drinking too much of tea, coffee, alcohol or smoking. It takes just 60 minutes to give a fresh lease of life to those dull stained yellowish teeth by transforming them into dazzling brilliant white teeth. In today’s time our appearance is vital to our success and social acceptance and 60 minutes of bleaching can provide us with the solutions. With todays materials the procedure is extremely safe with assured results and virtually no post bleaching blues like sensitivity. Whitening now is very cost effective and results also stay for around 2 years or more and maybe just a touch up is required. Whitening can be done in three ways: 1. In-Clinic Bleaching which usually lasts 60 minutes 2. Home Bleaching system where bleaching solution is applied in custom made clear soft trays and worn overnight. 3. A combination of both methods in cases of stubborn stains. Emergency Care Dentists on call for immediate appointments to relieve pain, extractions, root canals, re-cement crowns, trauma, etc. A dental emergency is not unlike any other medical emergency. When one strikes, you need to know what steps you can take to improve your situation, and you need to know who you can turn to for help. With that in mind, Dr.Talia Sidiqqua are renowned emergency dentists who are committed to offering attentive treatment to patients from all across Bangalore. Same-Day Dental Treatments Available When you call us to report your emergency, we will offer valuable tips for managing your situation and help to schedule a time for you to come in immediately. We always do our best to provide patients with same-day service for an emergency. Follow all instructions and remain calm until you reach our office. If you have a more advanced dental emergency, or you cannot reach us, report to a nearby emergency room as soon as you can. Some of the most common dental emergencies include: Toothache Dental Infection Gum Infection Cracked or Fractured Tooth Broken Crown Tooth Loss Tooth Knocked Out Broken Denture Tooth pain can occur as a result of a broken or cracked tooth, a new cavity or decay under an old filling or crown. Other factors include damage to the tooth as a result of excessive grinding or clenching or a broken filling. Typically, taking pain relievers such as ibuprofen or acetaminophen will dull the pain until you are ready to see the dentist, but call Vero Dental Spa as soon as possible about your toothache. Proper identification and treatment of dental infections is important to prevent its spread to other parts of the face and skull and possibly even to the bloodstream. Common Emergency Treatments Tooth Extraction Root Canal Treatment Crown for Broken Tooth Gum Infection Treatment Recement Crown Repair Broken Denture Are you in the middle of a dental emergency right now? Don’t hesitate to give our Glamour Dental Care a call immediately. Dr. Talia Sidiqqua along with our experienced team is ready to give you the emergency care you need. Dental Implants Dental implants are the most advanced form of fixed tooth replacement available today. They can be used for a variety of purposes like to replace a single tooth, Implant supported bridges (multiple teeth replacement without taking the support of adjoining teeth as in conventional bridge) or to stabilize a loose denture for efficient chewing with stability and support inside the mouth. A typical Implant consists of a titanium screw resembling a tooth root with a roughened or smooth surface. These pure titanium implants are placed surgically into the bone and allowed to heal for a period orf 3-6 months so that they get firmly attached to the bone. Post integration of implants with the bone necessary prosthesis is fabricated to provide function and aesthetics to the patient. Beautiful Smile. Our Services General Checkups Dental Implants Restoration Cosmetic Dentistry Teeth Whitening Orthodontic Care Smile can be considered to be the most significant feature on one’s face. Unfortunately, there are people who are unhappy with their misaligned or crooked look that destroys their beautiful smile. Smile designing is the procedure to restore and recreate the sparkling smile. Smile Designing There’s a story behind every smile… For the purpose of improvising the smile, the tooth structure can be altered, reduced, added, repositioned or reorganized in terms of texture and colour. There are lots and lots of techniques available nowadays for altering one’s smile. Dentistry today is capable of creating the smile that you desire to have. There are procedures to get the teeth in the right proportion, in the right alignment, shape and colour in proportionate with the rest of the face. Smile designing brings self-confidence as well as improving the aesthetic appeal. The procedures you may have to undergo may include bleaching, cleaning, gum lifting, extraction, dental braces, dental implants etc. Treatment Options Main treatment options under smile designing are the following: Recontouring Veneers Prosthetic works Smile makeover Smile rejuvenation Instant orthodontics Orthodontics Surgical corrections etc. Learn More Dental treatments in USA, UK and other European countries can prove to be very expensive compared to attractive dental tourism destinations like India. Dental tourism in India has flourished over the years due to compelling reasons such as:. India has always been a very popular tourist destination. Located in southern Asia, India houses the legendary monument of love, the Taj Mahal. However, Incredible India does not end with this wonder of the world; centuries of history take you on a mystical journey in the land of colours. From the Portuguese churches in Goa, to the traditional Rajputana carvings in Rajasthan; from the majestic Golden temple in the north, to the pristine Kerala backwaters in the south, every state holds a distinct flavour in its architecture, cuisines, lifestyles, and medicine. More and more people are choosing India for dental treatment abroad, because of reputation of Indian doctors, affordable cost of dental treatment, ease of travel and no language barrier. All this has given a great boost to dental tourism in India. Cosmetic dental treatments in India have gained immense popularity, with its success and cost benefits ringing across the globe. A beautiful smile imparts self-confidence and happiness to the person. Cosmetic dentistry makes it possible for everyone to have these, especially with the above advantages in a country like India. Dental Tourism Bengaluru India There’s a story behind every smile… Dental tourism is a subset of medical tourism. Also known as dental medical tourism, it entails pursuing dental treatments abroad at attractive medical tourism destinations, away from one’s own region or country. The reasons could be low cost of dental treatment abroad, or non availability of specialised dental treatment in the home country. Dental insurance and treatment costs in developed countries such as USA and UK are exorbitant as compared to dental treatment cost in India Dollar or pound conversion rates with respect to Indian Rupee gives a distinct cost advantage to the country Quality healthcare in accordance with international standards Rigorous infection control systems at par with the western standards Ease of communication with fluency in English of the nursing staff and doctors Electronic records of patient history and treatment management Query, consultation and case management co-ordination of the entire trip plan and its execution by medical tourism companies Most Popular Dental Treatment Packages in India Dental Implants Dental Crowns Dental Fillings Dental Bonding Dental Bridges Dental Caps Dentures Root Canals Most people like to club dental tourism with a fun-filled vacation. Since there is no downtime or recovery required during or after dental treatment , it is most amenable to tourism before and after the treatment . So you can see why we’re confident we can transform your smile Painlessly in the following situations… So it’s now possible to transform your SMILE and your fear of going to the dentist! Your teeth can be cosmetically whitened in 1 hour using the fabulously quick & effective Brite Smile System, or over time using specially approved dental bleaches. And more importantly Your teeth can be reshaped and gaps filled with the latest tooth coloured composites or crowns to create amazing results for you. Your Dentist Knows Best Don’t rush when you brush! Brushing our teeth is such a routine part of our day, we don’t tend to give it much thought, but it might be that you’re actually brushing your teeth the wrong way and jeopardising your oral health . Looking after your teeth properly will ensure that they last you a lifetime and reduce the treatment you have to undergo when you visit the dentist . Visit your dentist once in 6 months The best way to protect your smile and oral health is thru regular dental exams and appointments with our Glamour care in Bangalore. Allows our dental team the chance to supply optimal care and services for your smile and overall health. Don’t Forget to Floss! Flossing is an integral a part of your oral health regimen; however, many of us don’t spend enough time flossing their teeth, or they don’t floss in the least . By flossing just once a day, you can decrease your risk of gum disease and increase your chances of maintaining good oral health through out your lifetime. Teeth whitening systems usually use a hydrogen peroxide gel that is applied to your teeth. The ingredients work to get rid of the stains left on your teeth from various things.
